Research Experience

CARES Group, IIT Dharwad
Research & Development Intern · Oct 2022 – May 2023

  • Worked on microarchitectural optimization using instruction criticality models
  • Extended the TEJAS simulator with a two-level cache design prioritizing critical instructions
  • Evaluated ROB sizing and TLB trade-offs, achieving a 33% improvement in pipeline efficiency
  • Explored performance–complexity trade-offs in speculative execution

Nokia Bangalore University Relations (NBUC)
Project Intern · Jul 2022 – Dec 2022

  • Built an OCR + sentiment analysis pipeline for large confidential documents
  • Used Tesseract with ABSA-PyTorch, outperforming EasyOCR by ~33% accuracy
  • Dockerized the pipeline for scalable internal deployment

Department of ISE, BMSCE
Undergraduate Research Project · Aug 2021 – Sep 2021

  • Led a capstone project under TEQIP AI initiative
  • Built Internet Guru, a CLIPS-based expert system for rule-driven learning recommendations

Industry Experience

Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), Bengaluru, India
Cloud Engineer · Aug 2023 – Aug 2025

  • Automated Red Hat OpenShift cluster deployments using Python and REST APIs, reducing setup time by 30%
  • Built and prototyped Private Cloud AI Essentials (PCAI) stacks on developer systems
  • Integrated MinIO S3 and Kubernetes storage operators for AI workloads
  • Implemented Keycloak- and OAuth2-based authentication pipelines
  • Migrated legacy LDAP systems to GreenLake IAM and Okta
  • Integrated Istio and SPIRE for zero-trust, workload-level authentication
  • Contributed to LLM Tool Mesh initiatives using LangChain and multi-agent systems
  • Ran POCs enabling HPE Unified Analytics on EKS and GKE

Cloud Development Intern · Jan 2023 – Jul 2023

  • Enabled OpenShift support for Unified Analytics
  • Optimized Prometheus integrations for performance and observability
  • Built secure access control pipelines using OAuth2-proxy

Bosch Global Software Technologies, Bengaluru, India
Software Engineering Intern · Jun 2022 – Jul 2022

  • Developed diagnostic test scripts for automotive ECUs
  • Worked with UDS, CAN protocol, CANalyzer, CANoe
  • Explored CAPL for advanced testing workflows

Projects

End-to-End Encrypted Messaging Engine (Double Ratchet)

  • Implemented asynchronous E2EE messaging using Double Ratchet
  • Achieved forward secrecy and post-compromise security
  • Stack: Java, ECDH, HKDF, AES-GCM, HMAC-SHA256

Akshara Mantapa: Infinite Kannada Text Library

  • Built a searchable infinite corpus inspired by the Library of Babel
  • Designed a 57,324-symbol Indic grapheme alphabet using greedy segmentation
  • Backend in Rust (Axum + WASM), frontend in SvelteKit

Post-Quantum & ZK Proof Benchmarking Framework

  • Built microservices wrapping ML-KEM (NIST FIPS 203) and Groth16
  • Observed ~17× throughput gap between lattice KEMs and ZK proving
  • Containerized and scaled using Kubernetes

Publications & Presentations

VLSI Design Contest 2023 – Top 15 Finalist

  • Presented Hardware Acceleration of Convolution Core on SoC FPGA at VLSID 2023
  • Achieved a 5.26% increase in additions per clock using PolarFire SoC
  • Synthesized CNNs using SmartHLS and received industry feedback
